overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark, futuristic Arasaka corporate facility in Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves through industrial corridors with red-lit server rooms, passing large exterior windows before entering a secure B1 server area.

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through dimly lit corridor toward glass security door

entered.detail: dark metallic wall panels lining the corridor
glass door with green light strip above showing security access
server racks visible through glass emitting red ambient light
white directional arrows painted on dark floor tiles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit corporate corridor with dark metallic walls. The camera approaches a glass security door with a green light strip, beyond which red-lit server racks are visible. White directional arrows guide the path forward on the polished floor.

events.description: passing through glass door into wider corridor with hexagonal wall patterns

agents.ego_description: proceeding past Arasaka container toward lit window area

entered.detail: wall featuring hexagonal tile pattern with directional signage
large red container with white Arasaka corporate logo
industrial piping and conduits running along ceiling

segments.scene_description: Passing through the glass security door, the corridor opens slightly to reveal hexagonal wall tiles and overhead industrial piping. A large red Arasaka shipping crate sits on the right side. The server room with red lighting now appears on the left as the camera moves toward a brighter area ahead.

events.description: entering area with bright exterior light streaming through large industrial windows

agents.ego_description: examining the B1 area with large windows and elevator access

entered.detail: tall industrial windows with bright exterior light and metal framing
elevator entrance with B1 level designation
illuminated red neon sign displaying B1
vertical industrial pipes running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene brightens significantly as the camera enters a corridor section with large exterior windows allowing light to flood in. On the right, an elevator entrance displays a red neon B1 sign. Industrial pipes line the walls as the camera turns to explore the area.

events.description: entering the B1 server room through glass doors

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the secure server room with red-lit racks

entered.detail: glass double doors leading into B1 server room
rows of server racks illuminated with red LED lighting
metal grate flooring inside server room entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the B1 entrance, approaching glass doors that reveal a server room bathed in red light. Passing through the doors, the environment becomes darker with rows of red-lit server racks extending into the distance. The space feels secure and isolated from the previous corridor areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile corporate facility that transitions from dim industrial corridors into a brightly lit hub before descending into a secure, red-lit server vault. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit hallway with dark metallic walls and white directional arrows, moving toward a glass security door that reveals a glimpse of red light beyond. As the camera passes through the door, the space opens into a section featuring hexagonal wall tiles and a large red Arasaka shipping crate, with the red-lit server room shifting to the left. The scene then brightens significantly as the camera enters a corridor flooded with light from large exterior windows, passing a red neon B1 elevator sign and industrial piping. Finally, the camera turns toward the B1 entrance and glides through glass doors, leaving the brightness behind to enter a dark, isolated expanse of rows of red-lit server racks extending into the distance.
